title: stylidium ramosum
intro: Stylidium ramosum, commonly known as the button spider or button triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, and can be used to treat various ailments. Stylidium ramosum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
